title: C@P SERVICE CENTERS - 211info
text: SAFE PARKING C@P SERVICE CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place for people to take showers, do laundry, access case management services, and be indoors. 2640 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 18-24 Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (971) 375-7491 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 375-7491 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to use services or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Youth Issues Drop In Centers * Youth Issues Laundry Facilities * Youth Issues Public Showers/Baths * Youth Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Youth Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE PARKING
